title: azalea decora
intro: Azalea decora, a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region, is a type of rhododendron that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting respiratory health. Azalea decora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
